description: Load the motor imagery EEG recording from Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt. Isolate the motor cortex channels so that only Channel 3 and Channel 4 are visible in the data stream. Use the application's built-in screenshot feature to capture the view of the isolated channels while the session is running. Do not use system-level screenshot tools.
